inputs.source_exit: canonical RF-exit particle state registered in the S2 instrument frame
inputs.pulse_left_limit: COMSOL sparse active-particle state at t_pulse^-
inputs.terminal_census: one terminal classification row for every source-exit particle
inputs.pulse_schedule: S3 state-driven centroid schedule with the selected cohort

population_contract.scheduler_cohort: the exact selected_cohort.particle_ids from the pulse schedule
population_contract.capture_all_active: every unique active row in the t_pulse^- table
population_contract.losses: source-exit IDs absent from capture, attributed from terminal event and terminal_reason
population_contract.policy: No particle may be dropped from source accounting to make a beam width smaller.

metric_contract.axis_summary: centroid, centroid-centered RMS and p95 absolute centroid deviation for x, y and z
metric_contract.energy: mean and sample standard deviation derived from mass and all three velocity components
metric_contract.direction: angles to the +x guide axis, reported as mean, RMS and p95 absolute angle
metric_contract.projected_emittance: sqrt(var(r_i)*var(v_i)-Cov(r_i,v_i)^2) in mm*m/s; y and z also use slope v_i/v_x in mm*rad
metric_contract.ideal_volume: fraction inside the oaTOF baseline particle-source box
metric_contract.ballistic_prediction: propagate each exit state to the existing pulse time with its true velocity and global clock; compare only common IDs with COMSOL capture
